raw_consumer_statement:
I opened this account on XX/XX/XXXX. I never used it other than the purchase I made on XX/XX/XXXX. On the statement I received for the period XX/XX/XXXX - XX/XX/XXXX i saw charge of {$34.00} for XX/XX/XXXX. This was 14 months since the account had last been used. I did not make this purchase. I then contacted the company by phone to let them know that this was a fraudulent charge. I was assured that the situation would be cared for. I promptly closed the account. 

The next thing the company did was send me a letter saying that they had determined that the charge was not fraudulent. I called several more times and each time I was assured that this charge and the late fees the company kept adding on would be reversed. However all I kept getting was letters saying that the charge was not fraudulent. 

I finally found out where I could send a letter of complaint. In the letter I sent to them I explained that in XXXX of XXXX when the purchase in question was made I could not possible have made the purchase because I was in the midst of receiving XXXX and XXXX treatment for XXXX XXXXXXXX. 

The company has also reported to the Credit Reporting Bureaus that my account is delinquent and has caused my excellent credit rating of XXXX to to to just a very good credit rating of XXXX. This entire situation is totally unacceptable to me. 

In addition the company is continually harassing me with text messages and emails XXXX. Reminding me that my account is delinquent even while there is an open dispute.

2. Offering to set up a payment plan for me while there is still an open dispute.

The next section is requesting my account number. I unfortunately do not have the entire number because once I submitted a claim for a fraudulent charge they changed my account number and only dsent me the last four digits of the new account number,
